karnyark-with-lamb-meat-lezzet.name: Milk With Lamb Meat
instructions: 1. Cut and peel the ends of eggplants.
2. Wait for 10 minutes in salty water to get the pain.
3. Dry the slide with paper towel.
4. Wash the bird meats and take it in a pot.
5. Add and cook water to light over.
6. Crochet onions.
7. Peel and slice garlic.
8. Peel the shells of tomatoes and chop the cube.
9. Clean and eliminate the cores of peppers and prepare for two precise and coarse chops.
10. Heat the olive oil in a pan.
11. 11. Add and remove the onions and salt you're eating.
12. When the onions begin to pink, add the bird meat and roast until soften.
12. August Add garlic, tomatoes, spike pepper, salt and pepper.
14 July Bake for 10 minutes on the ground fire.
15. Heat the sunflower oil in a pan.
16. Grow eggplants backlightly in the angry oil.
17. September Glow eggplants on paper towel and pull out excess fat.
18. Place the eggplants in a row to an oven container.
19. September Cut down the middle parts with the blade and share the meaty mortar.
20. 2 cups of tomato porridge add hot water and mix and pour from the edge of the oven container.
21. Cook the oily paper on the oven for 25-30 minutes before heated.
22. Take oil paper and cook for 10 minutes.
23. Serve hot by spreading dust parmesan cheese from the oven and sprinklers.
24. If you wish, you can also try the classic snowdrop recipe.

magical-chocolate-bars.name: Magical Chocolate Bars
instructions: Line a baking sheet with waxed paper.

Remove lid from ice cream container; cut container off ice cream, working quickly, and turn ice cream on its side on a work surface. Insert craft sticks into side of ice cream, evenly spacing sticks. Cut ice cream between sticks, creating 3 bars.
Arrange ice cream bars on the prepared baking sheet; freeze until completely solid, 8 hours to overnight.
Place chocolate chips and coconut oil in a microwave-safe bowl; microwave in 30-second intervals, stirring after each interval, until shell mixture is smooth, 1 to 2 minutes.

Hold 1 ice cream bar over a separate measuring cup; pour shell mixture over bar to cover completely. Let chocolate dry for a few seconds; pour shell mixture over bar again, creating a thick shell. Place bar back on the waxed paper. Repeat with remaining bars and shell mixture.
Freeze bars until set, at least 15 minutes.

make-a-good-bowl-of-fruits-and-cereals-c.name: Make A Good Bowl Of Fruits And Cereals
make-a-good-bowl-of-fruits-and-cereals-c.original_name: Haz un buen bol de frutas y cereales
instructions: It combines milk with chia seeds. Mix and let hydrate for about 10 minutes.
Mientras, toma el cambur, pela y corta en rodajas. Haz lo propio con el kiwi.
The strawberries, remove the stalk and slice into medium slices. Wash the raspberries and cranberries. Reserve.

Take a favorite bowl and we'll place. It lays a Greek yogurt base. On the other hand, scattering purified cheesebies. It later incorporates fruits such as kiwi, banana, cranberries, strawberries and raspberries.
Now, you'll be ready to taste. Enjoy!

make-ahead-turkey-stock.name: Make-ahead Turkey Stock
instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C (232°C). Arrange turkey wings and neck, if using, on a rimmed baking sheet. Roast, turning turkey halfway through, until golden brown, about 45 minutes.

Transfer the roasted wings and neck to a large stockpot. Pour off and discard any fat from the baking sheet. Pour 2 cups of water onto the baking sheet and scrape up any browned bits with a wooden spoon. Pour this liquid from the sheet into the pot with the turkey.
Add the onion, carrot, celery, parsley, thyme, peppercorns, bay leaf, and 10 cups of water to the stockpot.
Bring the mixture to a simmer. Reduce heat to low and simmer gently, uncovered, until the stock is reduced by at least one-third, about 4 hours.
Strain the stock through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean saucepan, discarding all solids.
If you have more than 6 cups of stock, simmer it, uncovered, over medium heat until reduced to 6 cups.
Let the stock cool completely. Pour into an airtight container; cover and chill.
Do Ahead: Stock can be made 3 days ahead and kept chilled. Stock can also be frozen for up to 3 months.

mango-chipotle-guacamole.name: Mango Chipotle Guacamole
instructions: Mash avocados in a small bowl, leaving chunks if desired. Mix in mango, garlic, cilantro, lime juice, chipotle powder and salt. Serve immediately.

maragato-stew-traditional-recipe-comeder.name: Maragato Stew, Traditional Recipe
instructions: As we have stated earlier, before we start preparing this plate, chickenpods should have been removed during the night before their cooking. Before using them, rinse them with fresh water.
En el caso de las piezas de carnes, ya deben estar bien limpias y listas para su uso.

That said, let's get to cooking the cooking ingredients. We're gonna need a good-sized pot, and we'll get some water warmer. Once hot, we will add the frosted chicken thigh, the previously soaked lung, the bacon, the foot and ear of pork, the pancette, the mug and ham bone. If necessary, we will add more water to cover all the ingredients, and then we will let them cook under low heat, till they start boiling.
At this point, we will remove with a spoon the excess fat that has been accumulated at the surface of the cooking water.

Then we'll add to the pot the chickpeas we have purped and rinsed earlier. Just as before, if necessary we will add more water to exceed the level of all solids. If you want the cooking to advance faster, add hot water directly.
When the ingredients start boiling again, we will start to count 3 and a half hours of cooking time.

Mientras se cocinan las carnes y los garbanzos, aprovecharemos el tiempo para hacernos cargo de las patatas y la berza. En el caso de la primera, la lavaremos bien y la trocearemos en forma de cintas, con un cuchillo bien afilado sobre una tabla para picar.
For potatoes, we'll peel them and cut them into pieces the size of a bite.
The following will be to heat up another pan with water. Once it's boiling, we'll add a minced beret with a touch of salt to its taste. Let's let her cook for 20 minutes.

After the seawater's cooking time, we'll scrape and place them in a bowl. We have to avoid disposal of water, that will go to the cooking pot of the meat and chickpeas, to bring about taste and compensation for the evaporate fluid.
When half an hour of cooking remains for meat and chickenpods, we will add minced potatoes and cheeks and cheeks. We'll let them cook with the other ingredients up to the end of the time indicated.
Besides, we're gonna peel our garlic teeth and mingle them into tiny pieces. Then we'll warm up an oil chorrit in a frying pan with low heat. Once hot, we'll add the garlic.

We'll let them cook for a few minutes, get them some color. Then we'll scold him with a touch of sweet peppermint and a pint of salt. We will then add the beret, mix everything and let them cook for a few more minutes.
We'll try the cabbage, we'll fix that if necessary and we'll leave it ready to serve.

marinated-greek-inspired-chickpea-salad.name: Marinated Greek-inspired Chickpea Salad
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Whisk lemon juice, olive oil, vinegar, garlic, pepper, and salt for vinaigrette together in a large salad bowl.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Stir chickpeas, cherry tomatoes, feta cheese, cucumber, bell pepper, onion, and mint into the bowl until well coated with vinaigrette.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Serve immediately or refrigerate until flavors have melded, 8 hours to overnight.'}

maritime-war-cake.name: Maritime War Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9-inch tube pan or two 8x4-inch loaf pans.
Bring water, raisins, molasses, sugar, and shortening to a boil in a saucepan; reduce heat to low and simmer until raisins are plump, about 5 minutes. Cool.
Whisk flour, cinnamon, and baking soda together in a bowl; stir into raisin mixture until well combined; pour into the prepared tube pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean, about 1 hour.

matcha-cheesecake-recipe-comedera.name: Matcha Cheesecake Recipe
matcha-cheesecake-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de tarta de queso con matcha

ingredients.item: 2 cdas de matcha en polvo (de alta calidad)

instructions: Tritura muy bien las galletas hasta que queden finas como arena.
Mezcla las galletas con la mantequilla derretida y pasa a un molde redondo de 22 cm (que sea desmontable).
Presiona las galletas hasta que quede una base compacta. Refrigera por 15 minutos.
It purifies the oven at 180 and 3.
The cream cheese and sugar are well mixed into an electric mixer until a smooth and smooth texture remains.
Incorpora los huevos a velocidad baja uno a uno.
Vierte de a poco la crema de leche y la esencia de vainilla hasta que queden bien mezclados todos los ingredientes.
Taste the matcha and innude it to the mixture.
Gently mix until integrated and give the characteristic green color.
Una vez integrado, vierte la mezcla en el molde con la base de las galletas hasta que quede todo bien esparcido.
Baked for about 50 minutes at 160 and 3 till the cake has been curved.
When curved, remove from the oven and let cool at room temperature.
Una vez reposado, refrigera por al menos 4 horas para que tenga la textura ideal.
Pasado ese tiempo, desmolda y corta en porciones.

meat-chaufa-rice-recipe-comedera.name: Meat Chaufa Rice Recipe
meat-chaufa-rice-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de arroz chaufa de carne

ingredients.item: ½ tbps (tablespoon) of sugar (or ajinomoto optionla)
4 tbps (cucharadas) de salsa de soya oscura

instructions: On a pounding board, we cut the meat into small cubes. Trying to get them to have a similar size.
Sazonamos con la pasta de ajo, la pimienta, la salsa de soya, dejamos marinar por 10 minutos.
Cortamos los vegetales: la cebolla china (tanto lo blanco como lo verde), el pimiento en cubo.
In a frying pan we add some oil and when hot we add the meat and let them cook for about 4 minutes. Let's have a reservation.
Agregamos los huevos batidos y cocemos, cuando tenga una capa cocida empezamos a mezclar con una cuchara, no necesitamos voltearla sino que se cocine todo el huevo. Reservamos.
In the clear frying pan, we'll drink the white part of Chinese onion, add ginger and garlic dough, cook for 2 minutes.
We add the pepper and let cook for 1 minute.
Agregamos el arroz y mezclamos bien.
Agregamos la carne y el huevo y mezclamos muy bien.
We added soya, ostion sauce, sugar or ajinomoto.
We end with the drops of ajonjoli oil while minting.
With frying pan off, we add the green part of the Chinese onion and are ready to serve.

meemaws-bourbon-balls.name: Meemaw's Bourbon Balls
instructions: Grind cookies in a food processor into fine crumbs; transfer to a large bowl.

Grind pecans in the food processor; add to cookie crumbs in the bowl. Stir in 1 cup confectioners' sugar, bourbon whiskey, cocoa powder, and corn syrup until mixture holds together; roll into 3/4-inch balls.

Spread coconut onto a plate and 1/4 cup confectioners' sugar onto a separate plate. Roll balls in coconut and sugar to coat. Arrange balls onto a platter, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate until hardened, at least 1 hour.

melitini-santorini-argiro.name: Melitini, Santorini

ingredients.item: 1 kg of flour for all uses
A little flour for opening the leaf
1 kg of flour for all uses
A little flour for opening the leaf

instructions: Add all the ingredients to the dough and knead until the dough becomes firm and firm.
Allow the dough to rest for at least 30 minutes.
In the meantime, we prepare the filling for the eggplants.

melted-fennel-pasta.name: Melted Fennel Pasta

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Cut stalks from 3 large fennel bulbs with fronds and cut fronds from stalks; discard stalks. Coarsely chop fronds and set aside. Remove tough out layer from bulbs and discard. Halve bulbs lengthwise (through root ends) and remove cores; discard. Thinly slice bulbs crosswise.

Heat ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Add fennel bulbs, 1 medium onion, thinly sliced, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 tsp. sugar; stir to combine. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is translucent and fennel is beginning to brown around the edges, 8–10 minutes. Uncover and add 4 garlic cloves, finely chopped, 3 oil-packed anchovy filets, and ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes. Cook, stirring occasionally and reducing heat as needed to avoid scorching (stir in a splash of water if scorching does occur), until fennel and onion are deep golden brown and very soft and jammy, 15–20 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook 12 oz. gemelli, fusilli, or other medium pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until just shy of al dente, about 1 minute less than package directions.

Using a slotted spoon, transfer pasta to pot with sauce. Add 1 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about ½ cup), 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, and 2 cups pasta cooking liquid. Increase heat to medium-high and cook, stirring often, until sauce clings to pasta, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in 1 cup reserved fennel fronds, 1 tsp. finely grated lemon zest, and 2 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice. Taste and season with more salt if needed.
Divide pasta among shallow bowls and top with more reserved fennel fronds.

mexican-tamarind-candy.name: Mexican Tamarind Candy
instructions: Bring tamarind pulp, water, and orange to a boil in a pot; continue to boil for 30 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool for 30 minutes.

Pour tamarind mixture into a colander placed over a large bowl. Mash and scrape against the side of the colander until all the juice and pulp drips into the bowl. Dump remaining seeds into a strainer and repeat the process; remove the outer casing around the seeds by hand and toss out the seeds.
Blend outer casings with juicy pulp in an electric blender.

Return mixture to the large pot and add sugar, Tajin®, and butter. Bring to a soft boil, stirring constantly. Heat to 116°C (115 degrees C) or until a small amount of syrup dropped into cold water forms a soft ball that flattens when removed from water and placed on a flat surface.
Remove from heat and let cool, about 2 hours.

Fill a pastry or plastic sandwich bag with the candy mixture and squeeze onto plastic spoons. Place plastic spoons onto a cookie sheet and chill until firm, about 1 hour. Coat with more Tajin® if desired, wrap with plastic, and close with a twist tie.

mexican-turkey-burger.name: Mexican Turkey Burger
instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.

Mix together ground turkey, shredded cheese, poblano pepper, seasoned salt, and granulated onion in a bowl until thoroughly combined. Divide mixture into 4 portions. Roll each portion into a ball and press into a burger shape.

Place burgers on the preheated grill and cook, flipping once halfway through, until no longer pink in the center, about 15 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C). Serve on hamburger buns topped with mashed avocado.

michelada.name: Michelada
instructions: Rub the rim of a pint glass with lime wedge and dip in salt; fill glass with ice. Add lime juice, tomato juice, orange juice, and Worcestershire; season with hot sauce. Top off with cold Mexican lager and stir to combine.

mini-blueberry-yogurt-cupcakes-with-lemo.name: Mini Blueberry Yogurt Cupcakes With Lemon Glaze
mini-blueberry-yogurt-cupcakes-with-lemo.original_name: Mini bizcochos de yogur y arándanos con glaseado de limón

ingredients.item: 1 sachet of chemical yeast (royal type, about 16 g)
Molde para 12 mini bizcochos (preferiblemente de silicona), p.ej. estos

instructions: Put the oven at 180-3) with heat up and down. Put the yogurt into a bowl. Add your eggs and put them with your yogurt. Then add the sugar and remove till integrated.
Meg the flour with the yeast and add it to the dough, pounding carefully so that they do not have a clumps. Finally, pour the sunflower oil and gently mix it up to a homogenous mass.
Wash the cranberries, put them through some flour (so they don't sink) and add them to the mixture with soft movements.
It spreads mass into mini biscuits mold and fills them up to about 3 / 4 parts.
Hornea for 20 or 25 minutes till they're doradite. When we get them out of the oven, let them cool about 10 minutes before we get them out of their individual mold.
To finish, mix the 100 g of glass sugar with 2 or 3 tablespoons of lemon juice and pour it onto your biscuits.

mini-guacamole-vol-au-vent-teleculinaria.name: Mini Guacamole Vol-au-vent
instructions: Once thawed, dispose of the leafy dough on a tray lined with vegetable paper. Cut small circles with a mass cutter, mark the center of each with a knife (without cutting to the bottom, that is, cutting up to 1 cm deep).
Eliminate the surplus dough and brush the vol-au-vent with the beaten egg. Take it in the oven, preheated at 185°C, for about 20 minutes. Take it off and let it cool.

Peel the avocados, remove their pit and dispose of the pulp in a bowl. Add the lemon juice and the chopped chives, season with salt and pepper and crush everything with a graph. Finally, add the chopped onion and wrap.

Remove the smallest circle from the inside of the vol-au-vent and fill them with guacamole (avocado paste). Cut the smoked salmon into small pieces and dispose of them over the filling. Serve immediately.

mini-sweet-potato-pies.name: Mini Sweet Potato Pies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).
In a medium bowl, combine the mashed sweet potatoes, butter, eggs, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, ginger, salt, brown sugar, and granulated sugar and whisk until smooth.
Roll out the pie crust. Spread the butter over the crust. Mix the cinnamon and sugar together in a small bowl, then sprinkle over the pie crust.
Using a cup or a cookie cutter, cut 4-inch (10 cm) circles from the pie crust.
Scoop about 2 tablespoons of the sweet potato mixture onto half of the cut-out dough circles.
Place the remaining dough circles over the filling, pressing the edges down with a fork to seal. Brush with the beaten egg.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Dust the pies with powdered sugar.
Enjoy!

mint-flan-recipe-comedera.name: Mint Flan Recipe
instructions: It starts with caramel: in a casserole mixes sugar with water. Cooking with medium heat - soft till you dissolve and get caramel.
Una vez listo, vierte en el molde y esparce muy bien.
Swallow milk into a saucer and incorporates mint leaves. Mix and cook till you're about to boil, turn off.
Let the mixture rest and when cold, remove the mint leaves.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Gather the mint-flavoked milk to a blender as well as condensed milk, vanilla and eggs.
Mix very well till it's homogenous.
Fold the mixture into the mold and baker's bath by about 25 to 30 minutes at 180 ° C
When the flan's completely curved, let them cool and crumble.
Fridge and you'll be ready to enjoy.

mint-truffles.name: Mint Truffles
instructions: Place chocolate in a medium bowl. Bring cream to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat. Pour over chocolate and let sit until chocolate is softened, about 3 minutes. Add mint extract and whisk until smooth. Cover and chill until ganache is firm enough to roll into balls, at least 3 hours.

Pulse sugar and fresh mint in a food processor until mint is very finely chopped; transfer to a small bowl. Scoop out a scant tablespoonful of ganache. Roll into a ball (if you’d like, wear disposable gloves to keep your hands clean), then roll in mint sugar. Place on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Repeat with remaining ganache. Chill truffles until firm, at least 1 hour.
Do ahead: Ganache can be made 3 days ahead; keep chilled. Truffles can be made 1 week ahead; store airtight in the refrigerator.

mixed-berry-balsamic-vinaigrette.name: Mixed Berry Balsamic Vinaigrette
instructions: Muddle together blueberries, strawberries, and raspberries with sugar in a medium bowl until combined.
Pour berry mixture into a blender and add balsamic vinegar, olive oil, Dijon, lemon juice, and honey. Blend until smooth.

molded-tiramisu-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Molded Tiramisu Recipe
instructions: Beat the yolks with half the sugar, until the mixture becomes creamy and off-white. Involve the markapone and book.
On the other hand, beat the clears in castle, adding the remaining sugar gradually, and wrap well with the cheese preparation.
In a tray or way of opening, make alternate layers of la reine sticks, previously wet in coffee, and cream (the last layer should be cream). Sprinkle with cocoa powder and lead to cold until served.

mommas-chicken-and-dumplings.name: Momma's Chicken And Dumplings
instructions: Melt butter in a stock pot over medium-high heat. Add celery, carrot, onion, garlic, bay leaves, thyme, salt, pepper, and poultry seasoning; cook and stir until flavors combine, about 5 minutes.
Push vegetable mixture to the sides and add chicken; cook until browned, 3 to 5 minutes per side.
Pour enough water over the chicken to cover by 3 inches; bring to a boil. Stir, scraping the browned bits off of the bottom of the pot. Reduce heat; simmer until chicken is tender, about 1 hour.
Transfer chicken and carrots to a serving plate with a large slotted spoon; let cool.
Ladle 1/4 cup cooking liquid into a bowl; cool slightly, about 5 minutes. Mix in 2 tablespoons flour. Stir back into the pot.
Place 2 cups flour in a large bowl; cut in shortening with 2 knives until mixture forms pea-sized bits. Mix in chilled chicken broth until dough is combined.

Turn dough out onto a floured work surface. Knead 5 to 6 times; pat down to 1-inch thickness. Sprinkle lightly with flour; roll out to about 1/8-inch thickness. Cut dough into squares with a sharp knife.

Drop squares, in batches, into simmering cooking liquid, moving squares to the side with each addition. Partially cover pot; simmer until dumplings are firm, about 12 minutes. Separate any dumplings that stick together. Remove from heat; keep covered.
Bone chicken; cut into bite-sized pieces and return to the pot. Chop carrot; return to the pot. Cool chicken and dumplings, about 30 minutes, before serving.
Enjoy!

morel-mushroom-soup.name: Morel Mushroom Soup
instructions: Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat. Cook mushrooms in butter in batches, turning occasionally, until golden brown, about 10 minutes. Add a portion of the garlic at the end of each batch and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute. Remove mushroom mixture to a plate.
Add onion to the pot. Cook and stir until onion has softened and turned translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add mushroom mixture, thyme, and parsley. Pour wine into the pot and cook while scraping the browned bits of food off the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon, about 3 minutes.
Sprinkle flour over the mixture and stir until well incorporated.
Add broth, bouillon, salt, and pepper and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until thickened, about 10 minutes.
Stir in cream and enough milk to reach desired thickness. Cook until heated through.

mozzarella-pie.name: Mozzarella Pie

ingredients.item: Flaky sea salt (such as maldon) and crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Place a rack in lower third of oven and preheat to 525° or as high as oven will go.

Once dough has risen on baking sheet, top with mozzarella, and dot pie with tomato sauce; sprinkle with salt and red pepper flakes, if desired. Bake pie until golden brown and crisp on bottom and sides, 20–30 minutes.

mushroom-lasagna-with-hot-sausage-and-sp.name: Mushroom Lasagna With Hot Sausage And Spinach
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Coat a 10x15-inch baking dish with cooking spray. Slice sausage links.

Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Cook and stir sausage and onions in the hot skillet until sausage is browned, 5 to 7 minutes. Add mushrooms and continue cooking until soft and browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat. Drain excess grease.
Place spinach in a medium bowl. Microwave, uncovered, for 3 1/2 minutes. Pour in ricotta cheese and beaten egg. Stir well until blended.
Combine Alfredo sauce and milk in a medium bowl. Mix well.

Spread about 1/2 cup sauce evenly on the bottom of the prepared baking dish. Place 3 uncooked noodles over sauce. Spread 1/2 of the spinach mixture over the noodles followed by 1/2 of the sausage mixture. Sprinkle with 1/3 of the mozzarella cheese. Place 3 more noodles on top and pour 1 1/2 cups sauce over noodles. Spread remaining spinach mixture over top of noodles followed by remaining sausage mixture. Sprinkle with another 1/3 of mozzarella. Place 3 more noodles over the mozzarella and pour remaining sauce evenly on top. Sprinkle with remaining mozzarella.
Spray a sheet of aluminum foil with cooking spray and cover the dish tightly, sprayed-side down.
Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes. Remove aluminum foil and continue to bake until noodles are soft and lasagna is bubbly, 10 to 15 minutes. Let rest for 10 minutes before serving.

mushroom-paella-with-kale-and-eggs.name: Mushroom Paella With Kale And Eggs

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves coarsely chopped (about 8 cups)

instructions: Place porcini mushrooms in a medium bowl and cover with 1 cup boiling water; let sit 30 minutes. Line a fine-mesh sieve with 2 layers of paper towel and set over another medium bowl; pour mushroom mixture through (towels will catch any grit from mushrooms). Set aside porcini mushrooms and soaking liquid.

Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Cook onion, carrot, and celery, stirring occasionally, until softened, 5–7 minutes. Add crimini mushrooms, parsley, thyme, peppercorns, salt, reserved porcini mushrooms and their soaking liquid, and 6 cups cold water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer 30 minutes.
Strain stock into a clean saucepan and keep warm over low heat (you should have about 6 cups).
DO AHEAD: Stock can be made 4 days ahead. Cover and chill. Reheat before using.

Preheat oven to 425°. Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a 12” paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat. Cook mushrooms, tossing occasionally, until they release their liquid, about 4 minutes. Continue to cook until liquid evaporates and mushrooms are golden brown and tender, 5–7 minutes longer; season with salt and pepper and transfer to a plate.

Add 2 Tbsp. oil to pan and cook onion, bell pepper, and poblano chile, stirring often, until soft, about 3 minutes. Add garlic and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds; season with salt and pepper.

Add rice and cook, stirring constantly, until rice is translucent, about 3 minutes. Add wine and cook, stirring, until completely evaporated, about 2 minutes. Return mushrooms to pan, stir in 1 tsp. thyme, and add mushroom stock just to cover rice; season with salt and pepper. Cook, without stirring, adding broth as needed to keep rice moist while cooking, until rice is al dente and all liquid is absorbed, 15–20 minutes. (Shake pan after adding more stock to distribute evenly.)

Continue to cook paella, occasionally moving pan around burner to make sure all areas get evenly heated, until a crust (socarrat) forms around the sides and bottom of the pan (rice will smell toasted and make a light crackling sound), 6–8 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add kale, season with salt and pepper, and cook, tossing, until slightly wilted. Add ¼ cup water to skillet and cook kale, tossing, until completely wilted, about 5 minutes longer. Spoon over paella.
Make 4 shallow divots in the top of paella and crack an egg into each divot. Transfer pan to oven and cook paella until egg whites are just set, 8–10 minutes.
Top paella with parsley and more thyme and drizzle with Calabrian Chile Oil. Serve in pan.

mushroom-turkey-wellington-lezzet.name: Mushroom Turkey Wellington

ingredients.item: 200 gr Mushroom (see white chest,nut or mixed mushroom)
1 piece of milföy pulp (big size or pleasure in a way to assemble; piece)

instructions: 1. Hindi skyinione boardproduced on the car.
2. Hindi skywe shield salt, pepper and thyme.
3. Add some liquid oil to the pan and tease it.
4. Hindi sky both sides 5 minutes for cooking and cooling.
5. melt butter in a pan and add fine chopped onion and yellowms.
6. roast for 2-3 minutes until the onions are transparent.
7. Add chopped mushrooms, shake water and so on.
8.  Taze kekik, biberiye, tuz ve karabiber ekleyin.
9. Add to the cream and thoroughly deal of the mixture for a few minutes to cook.
10. Leave the mushroom mixture from the stove and cool.
11. 11. 11. 11. You can do Wellington in Hindi and drink after cooling.
12. Open the magic hindi chest with drink size.

17. Afiyet olsun.

mushroom-barley-veggie-burger.name: Mushroom-barley Veggie Burger

ingredients.prep: bread-and-butter pickles, torn lettuce, sliced tomatoes, and Dijon mustard (for serving)

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Cook barley in a small pot of boiling salted water until very tender, 40–50 minutes. Drain; let cool.

Meanwhile, chop mushrooms into ¼"–½" pieces. Arrange in an even layer on a large rimmed baking sheet. Drizzle with 1 Tbsp. oil, season with salt and pepper, and toss to coat. Roast until mushrooms have lost half of their volume and are tender, 12–15 minutes. This step is essential—it removes much of the excess liquid from the mushrooms, which would lead to a mushy patty. Let cool.

Spread beans on another large rimmed baking sheet and roast, tossing once, until most of them have split open and look dry around the edges, 8–10 minutes. The beans are an essential addition for binding the patty, and add protein. Let cool.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet over medium. Cook onion and garlic, stirring frequently, until soft, 8–10 minutes. Let cool. Pulse cashews and oats in a food processor until finely chopped.

Whisk mayonnaise, egg yolk, miso, chili powder, agave, paprika, and cayenne in a large bowl. Add cooled barley, mushrooms, beans, onion mixture, and cashew mixture. Mash with a potato masher until mixture is well blended and sticky, about 2 minutes. Transfer one-quarter of the mixture to food processor and pulse until very finely chopped. Return to bowl with remaining patty blend. Stir in cheddar and Cotija cheese; season with salt and pepper. Form mixture into 6 patties (lightly oiling your hands will prevent it from sticking).
Do Ahead: Patties can be made 2 days ahead; wrap tightly and chill. Or, freeze in a single layer, then wrap tightly up to 3 months. Thaw before cooking.

Heat oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium. Working in batches, cook patties until dark brown on both sides, about 10 minutes total. Place cheese slices over burgers, if using; cover and cook just long enough for cheese to melt, about 1 minute. Serve on buns with your choice of toppings.

mushrooms-au-poivre.name: Mushrooms Au Poivre

ingredients.prep: maitake, and/or king trumpet), halved, torn into 1" pieces if large

ingredients.item: Plus 2 tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil; plus more for drizzling
. diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: dry sherry, brandy, or low-sodium vegetable broth
mixed greens, fresh lemon juice, and country-style bread (for serving)

instructions: Place 2 Tbsp. black peppercorns on a cutting board or seal in a resealable plastic bag and coarsely crush with a large stainless-steel skillet or heavy pot. (Or, coarsely chop with a knife. They should be a lot coarser than what you would typically season with.)

Toss 2 lb. mixed mushrooms, halved, torn into 1" pieces if large, ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 2 tsp. crushed peppercorns in a large bowl to combine.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium cast-iron skillet over medium-high. Add half of mushrooms; top with a steak weight, small cast-iron skillet, or small heavy saucepan or pot. Cook until mushrooms release their juices and they are simmering, 5–7 minutes. Remove weight and cook until liquid is evaporated, about 3 minutes. Turn mushrooms over the best you can (you might have some broken pieces) and cook, stirring occasionally, until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a plate. Repeat process with remaining mushrooms.

Return all mushrooms to pan and reserve plate. Add 5 sprigs thyme, 4 garlic cloves, smashed, and 5 Tbsp. unsalted butter to mushrooms and cook, stirring often, until mushrooms are deeply browned and garlic and thyme are fragrant, about 4 minutes. Transfer mushrooms to reserved plate with slotted spoon.

Add 1 large shallot, finely chopped, and remaining crushed peppercorns to fat in pan; cook, stirring constantly, until shallot is softened, about 3 minutes. Remove pan from heat and carefully pour in 1½ cups cognac, dry sherry, brandy, or low-sodium vegetable broth. Return to heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until reduced by half, about 4 minutes. Add ½ cup heavy cream, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, and ½ tsp. balsamic vinegar; cook until sauce is thick enough to lightly coat a spoon, about 3 minutes. Add remaining 3 Tbsp. unsalted butter; stir until melted and emulsified.
Remove pan from heat; season sauce with more salt and freshly ground pepper if needed. (It should taste strongly of pepper.) Return mushrooms to pan; top with thinly sliced chives if desired.
Place mixed greens in a large bowl. Lightly drizzle with oil and fresh lemon juice, season with salt and pepper, and toss to coat. Serve mushrooms with salad and country-style bread alongside.
